hidden_state.goal: Decide whether to invest in building an internal developer platform or keep using existing CI/CD tools

opening_input: We need to decide whether to build our own developer platform or keep stitching together what we have
behavioral_rules: Pushes back on the first reframe. Asks 'why should I trust this process?' if the skill seems formulaic. Will open up after 2-3 good questions that demonstrate understanding. Has a hidden constraint: their CTO wants a decision by end of quarter.
